title: Stryker India is Hiring: Consultant Physician (Principal)

jsonLd.title: Stryker India is Hiring: Consultant Physician (Principal)
jsonLd.description:
Stryker India, one of India's leading organizations, is hiring a Consultant Physician for our Meerut operations. We offer a competitive salary package along with world-class benefits.

About Stryker India:
Stryker India is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Administer medications and treatments as prescribed
• Provide high-quality patient care and maintain patient records
• Monitor patient progress and adjust treatment plans accordingly
• Ensure patient privacy and maintain confidentiality
• Adhere to NABH/JCI accreditation standards
• Conduct routine health assessments and screenings
• Diagnose and treat medical conditions following established protocols

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Chartered Accountant (ICAI)
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in ICD-10
• Proficiency in Telemedicine
• Proficiency in NABH Standards
• Proficiency in Clinical Research
• Proficiency in Medical Terminology
• Proficiency in Medical Ethics
• Proficiency in HIPAA Compliance
• Proficiency in Medical Coding

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Learning & development budget
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Meerut, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Stryker India!
